CLOCK CLOCK CLOCK
THE FINAL WEIGHT OF THE FRAME IS EXPRESSED AS W MULTIPLIED BY 0.98 TO THE POWER OF N
TO ACHIEVE A TWENTY-FIVE PERCENT REDUCTION IN ENERGY EXPENDITURE WE SOLVE FOR N IN THE EQUATION ONE MINUS ZERO POINT NINE TWO TO THE POWER OF N EQUALS ZERO POINT TWENTY-FIVE
CALCULATING THIS YIELDS A VALUE OF N APPROXIMATELY TWENTY-SIX POINT SIX
SINCE N MUST BE A WHOLE NUMBER ALEX SHOULD ADD TWENTY-SEVEN ADVANCED COMPONENTS TO MEET THE GOAL
CLOCK CLOCK CLOCK
THIS SOLUTION OPTIMIZES PERFORMANCE FOR THE LONG-DISTANCE EVENT
